arts.ttl: Chelsea urged to sign Man Utd transfer target as 'final piece of the jigsaw' claim made
arts.sum: Chelsea are pushing to challenge for the Premier League title this season but have now been urged to address one of the major weaknesses in Enzo Maresca's squad

arts.ttl: FC Astana vs Chelsea bizarre kick off time explained as Enzo Maresca reveals 'not normal' plan
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has insisted that it is 'not normal' to fly eight hours one-way for a match in midweek ahead of his side's clash with Astana in the Conference League . Early kick-offs in Europe usually take place at 5:45pm UK time however the Blues will be taking to the pitch at 3:30pm on Thursday due to the five-hour time difference making it 8:30pm in Kazakhstan.

arts.ttl: Chelsea name TWELVE academy stars in squad for 7,000-mile-round trip to Kazakhstan as Enzo Maresca puts faith in young Blues for sub-zero temperature clash
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has taken a total of 12 Chelsea youngsters with him as part of his travelling squad for the club's 7000-mile round trip to face Astana in Kazakhstan on Thursday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Astana vs Chelsea: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Astana in the Europa Conference League on Thursday. Preview includes team news, how to watch on TV, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville's response when asked if Chelsea will win the Premier League speaks volumes
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captain Gary Neville has insisted that Chelsea will not win the Premier League this season despite sitting just four points behind Liverpool. The Blues have not lost since visiting Anfield and while Arsenal and City both dropped points on a weekend when Liverpool did not play due to adverse weather, Chelsea came from behind to beat rivals Tottenham Hotspur and move second in the table.
Chelsea transfer talks for 21-year-old 'moving quickly' Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei appears set for a January move to Serie A, according to Italian media.

arts.ttl: Axel Disasi makes honest Chelsea trophy claim as Enzo Maresca decision vindicated
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Axel Disasi has insisted the squad have not thought about the prospect of winning silverware this season despite their impressive start to the season. "We have a lot of quality players but in the dressing room, everyone is fighting for everyone, we are all friends, and in the Conference League or the Premier League, when you see the atmosphere after each game or in the dressing room when we put videos on social media, you can see the team spirit is really good."

arts.ttl: Five things spotted in Chelsea training as Enzo Maresca drops Pedro Neto hint
arts.sum: So, with that being said, football.london have spotted five things in training that you might have missed as Chelsea geared up to face Astana. Enzo Maresca has been putting his players through their paces in training ahead of Chelsea's next clash.

arts.ttl: Chelsea given green light to sign 'world-class' Liverpool star that wants to leave in January
arts.sum: I played so many times last season - and if you do well your valuation goes up because obviously the club is going to want a good profit. "I think Caoimhin got to the point in his career now where he’s going to have to make a big choice at the end of the season," Jason McAteer told beIN Sports .

arts.ttl: Howard Webb reveals how Moises Caicedo should have been punished for high challenge on Pape Sarr - as PGMOL chief admits the tackle was 'reckless' in Spurs and Chelsea clash
arts.sum: Eyebrows were raised when the Chelsea midfielder avoided punishment for a high challenge on his opposite numbers, with the tackle ankle-level and potentially seen as dangerous play.
